name: io.github.sebastienrousseau/corral
description: Local index for AI: query your Corral-organised workspace of cloned GitHub repositories via Model Context Protocol. Read-only tools and resources, zero network calls, runs on stdio.

tools.name: corral_list_repos
tools.description: List local clones in the Corral workspace, optionally filtered by visibility, language, name substring, or sync state.

tools.name: corral_find_repo
tools.description: Resolve a fuzzy repository name to a single local clone.

tools.name: corral_get_repo_metadata
tools.description: Return full metadata for one clone, including current branch.

tools.name: corral_status_summary
tools.description: Workspace summary with counts by visibility and language.

tools.name: corral_workspace_index
tools.description: Return the full structured index of the workspace in one call.
